implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Entrypoint for the program; initializes UserService and triggers user data fetch from JSONPlaceholder API.
implementation.name: main
implementation.pseudo_code:
Initialize logging
Create UserService instance
Call get_all_users() to fetch users
Log summary info for each user

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Service layer function that retrieves all users by delegating to UserRepository.
implementation.name: get_all_users
implementation.pseudo_code:
Call fetch_all_users() on UserRepository
Return list of User domain models

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Handles API communication; fetches user data from JSONPlaceholder and parses it into domain models.
implementation.name: fetch_all_users
implementation.pseudo_code:
Build API URL from base_url and users_endpoint
Send GET request to JSONPlaceholder
Raise error if request fails
Parse JSON response
For each user dict in response:
    Parse into User domain model
Return list of User objects

missing_implementations: No function or logic found that stores the fetched user data in a CSV file.

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Entry point of the application; sets up logging, creates UserService, and initiates the process to fetch all user records from JSONPlaceholder by invoking UserService.get_all_users(). Logs the number of users fetched and their summaries.
implementation.name: main()
implementation.pseudo_code:
IF script is run directly:
    Initialize logging
    Log start of user data fetch
    Create UserService instance
    Call get_all_users() to fetch users
    Log number of users fetched
    FOR each user in users:
        Log user summary

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Service layer function called by main(); delegates fetching user records to the UserRepository. Returns a list of User domain models.
implementation.name: UserService.get_all_users()
implementation.pseudo_code:
Call fetch_all_users() on UserRepository
Return list of User domain models

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Repository function responsible for connecting to the JSONPlaceholder API and retrieving all user records from the /users endpoint. Parses the response into User domain models.
implementation.name: UserRepository.fetch_all_users()
implementation.pseudo_code:
Construct URL for /users endpoint
Send GET request to URL
Raise error if request fails
Parse JSON response
FOR each user in response:
    Parse user dict into User domain model
Return list of User domain models
